text: As I stand in this contemporary hall, glass reflecting shifting images and fluorescent lights humming softly above, I catch my own reflection and sense a curious presence. The next room, vibrant with color and ideas bearing the words R+D, beckons me to reflect. I am intrigued by the displays—screens full of shifting thoughts, books open as if in mid-conversation. The statement about confusion and perception resonates with me; the line between clarity and ambiguity blurs in this space, inviting me to question my assumptions. I feel contemplative and quietly energized by the intellectual invitation before me.
